title: hymenophyllum rolandi-principis
intro: Hymenophyllum rolandi-principis, commonly known as Roland's scale fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Philippines, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Roland's scale fern include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into a tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties.
